name: Subsurface Scavenger
visual_description: A gaunt human scavenger crouches in shadow, tattered black rags clinging to a wiry frame. Dirt-smudged face, hollow cheeks, fingers wrapped in frayed cloth reaching toward scattered debris. Dim torchlight catches the glint of a crude dagger. The dungeon floor stretches behind, littered with picked-over bones and broken artifacts.
full_prompt: A gaunt human scavenger crouches in shadow, tattered black rags clinging to a wiry frame. Dirt-smudged face, hollow cheeks, fingers wrapped in frayed cloth reaching toward scattered debris. Dim torchlight catches the glint of a crude dagger. The dungeon floor stretches behind, littered with picked-over bones and broken artifacts.. Stylized digital illustration, heavy shadows with minimal light, organic textures and wet surfaces, unsettling asymmetry, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
